text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Whole egg consumption increases plasma choline and betaine without affecting TMAO levels or gut microbiome in overweight postmenopausal women.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Whole egg consumption increases plasma choline and betaine without affecting TMAO levels or gut microbiome in overweight postmenopausal women.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly reports that eating whole eggs raises plasma choline and betaine while leaving TMAO levels and the gut microbiome unchanged in the specified population.","population":"overweight postmenopausal women","intervention":"whole egg consumption","comparator":"","outcome":"plasma choline and betaine; TMAO levels; gut microbiome","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"Consuming commercially available eggs has a dose‑response effect on wintertime serum 25‑hydroxyvitamin D concentrations in young Australian adults over a 12‑week period.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Dose-Response Effect of Consuming Commercially Available Eggs on Wintertime Serum 25-Hydroxyvitamin D Concentrations in Young Australian Adults: A 12-Week Randomized Controlled Trial","entailment":"The title of the study indicates that egg consumption was examined for a dose‑response impact on wintertime serum 25‑hydroxyvitamin D levels in young Australian adults during a 12‑week trial.","population":"young Australian adults","intervention":"consuming commercially available eggs","comparator":"","outcome":"wintertime serum 25‑hydroxyvitamin D concentrations","timeframe":"12 weeks","quantifiers":"dose‑response","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"Living in northern latitudes is an endemic risk area for vitamin D deficiency.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Vitamin D and living in northern latitudes--an endemic risk area for vitamin D deficiency.","entailment":"The sentence explicitly links residence in northern latitudes with a heightened endemic risk of vitamin D deficiency.","population":"","intervention":"living in northern latitudes","comparator":"","outcome":"vitamin D deficiency risk","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"}]}
